visualBlueprint.subject: Text headline about AI and product leadership, call-to-action button, minimal geometric brand logo, stylized abstract trees represented inside black framed rectangles.
visualBlueprint.layout: Top left headline and button; top right brand logo; bottom arranged grid of framed abstract trees in soft pastel colors on a faded gradient background.
